nodes.name: .skillfish.json
nodes.summary: Skillfish metadata file for the docker-build skill tracking version, name, owner, repo, path, branch, SHA, and source for skill provenance and registry integration.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill documentation for the docker-build skill, describing its identity, build process with tracking, anti-patterns to avoid, and workflow for building Docker images with proper observation of build output.

nodes.name: manifest.yaml
nodes.summary: Archon skill manifest for the docker-build skill defining name, version, description, author, license, tags, trigger keywords, and priority for automatic skill activation during Docker build operations.
